hero.tagline: Maintenance & Remodeling Services — done with thirty years of craft, honest quotes, and a clean jobsite.

services.title: What we do — and how we do it.
services.subtitle: Seven core trades, one careful crew. We show up on time, leave the site cleaner than we found it, and finish what we start.

drywall.name: Drywall
drywall.desc: Patches, full sheetrock installs, smooth-finished walls and ceilings.

painting.name: Painting
painting.desc: Interior and exterior. Color consultation, prep, and a flawless finish.

kitchens.name: Kitchens
kitchens.desc: Full remodels, custom cabinetry, countertops and modern layouts.

flooring.name: Flooring
flooring.desc: Hardwood, laminate, vinyl, tile — installed level, sealed clean.

carpentry.name: Carpentry
carpentry.desc: Trim, built-ins, doors, framing — finished by hand, on the level.

repairs.name: General Repairs
repairs.desc: The honey-do list, done right. Small fixes to big punch lists.

gallery.title: Drag the divider. See the difference.
gallery.subtitle: Real homes. Real before-and-afters. Pull the slider to compare what the space looked like the day we walked in.
gallery.empty: No projects in this category yet — check back soon.

about.title: The kind of contractor you'd actually recommend.
about.subtitle: Three principles that haven't moved since we started. They're the reason most of our work comes from past clients.

experience.title: Experience
experience.body: Thirty years in the trade. Kitchens, baths, additions, full-home renovations and the thousand small jobs in between. We've seen the surprises behind every wall.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.body: Itemized quotes before we lift a hammer. No vague line items, no surprise change orders. If something on the wall changes the plan, we tell you before it costs you.

clean.title: Clean Work
clean.body: Drop cloths down, dust barriers up, shoes off at the door. We finish each day with a swept site, and we leave your home cleaner than we found it.

about.quote: They treated our home like it was theirs. Quote was honest, work was clean, and they finished a day early.
about.author: — María R., Kitchen Remodel · 2025

planner.title: Design your dream project in minutes.
planner.subtitle: Tell us your vision. We'll handle the rest.

plan.label: Start Planning
plan.desc: Answer a few questions about your space
plan.title: A few quick questions
plan.body: Tell us the room, the rough scope (cosmetic vs structural), your ideal timeline and ballpark budget. We'll send back a realistic plan within two business days.

upload.label: Upload Inspiration
upload.desc: Share photos of styles you love — Pinterest boards, screenshots, anything.
upload.title: Send us your references
upload.body: Drop photos in the estimator's Step 2, or DM them on Instagram. We'll match materials and finishes to what you're showing us — not what's easiest to install.

notebook.label: Build Your Notebook
notebook.desc: Save ideas and references in one place — like a moodboard for your project.
notebook.title: Pin from our moodboard
notebook.body: Browse our curated boards below — colors, materials, finishes — and pin the ones you love. They save to your device, and you can show us your notebook when we visit.

moodboard.title: Pin what you love. Build your notebook.
moodboard.subtitle: Browse colors, materials, finishes and rooms we've worked with. Heart the ones that feel like home — they save to your device.
moodboard.empty: Pin colors, materials and styles from the moodboard. They'll save here, on your device.

estimate.title: Three steps. Two business days. Zero pressure.
estimate.subtitle: Tell us about the project, the look you're after, and how to reach you. We'll come back with an honest plan, an itemized quote, and a realistic timeline.

step1.title: Your project
step1.roomSizeHint: Enter the approximate size and choose the unit.

step2.title: Your vision
step2.photosHint: Google Photos, Google Drive, Dropbox — any shareable image URL.
step2.photoError: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
step2.photoDuplicate: This link is already in the list.
step2.notesPlaceholder: e.g. We have two kids and a dog, weekend work is fine, we want it done by Thanksgiving…

smsModal.title: Open your SMS app
smsModal.body: Your SMS app will open with your request pre-filled. Review the message and tap Send to complete your request.
smsModal.qrBody: Scan this QR code with your phone's camera. Your SMS app will open with the request pre-filled — just tap Send.
smsModal.qrFallback: Prefer to call? Reach us at {{phone}}.

success.title: We've got it, {{name}}.
success.subtitle: We'll review your project and reach out via {{method}} within two business days with a plan and a quote.

contact.title: Pro Maintenance Corp.
contact.subtitle: Home maintenance and remodeling done with experience, honesty and a clean jobsite — proudly serving Escondido and North County.

validation.enterRoomSize: Tell us the size, even roughly.
validation.selectStyle: Pick a direction (you can change later).

testimonials.title: What our clients say.
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from real projects. Here's what homeowners think of our work.

reviews.lillian: Pro Maintenance transformed my home! Their team was punctual, professional, and completed the repairs efficiently. I couldn't be happier with the results and highly recommend their services to anyone in need of home maintenance.
reviews.daniel: Pro Maintenance exceeded my expectations! Their team was reliable, detail-oriented, and completed the job on time. The quality of their work truly stands out. I would definitely recommend them to anyone looking for dependable home maintenance services.
reviews.james: Outstanding experience with Pro Maintenance. From scheduling to completion, everything was smooth and professional. The team paid great attention to detail and delivered excellent results. I will absolutely use their services again.
reviews.rabab: The technicians were knowledgeable, courteous, and explained everything clearly. The repairs were done perfectly, and my home feels like new again. Highly recommended!
reviews.satoshi: Pro Maintenance provided fast, efficient, and high-quality service. It's refreshing to work with a company that truly cares about its customers and their homes.

testimonials.cta: Ready to see the difference quality makes?
